prompt: design a residential HVAC ductwork system

intent.design_goal: Design a residential HVAC ductwork system
unknowns: number and location of supply and return vents
desired airflow rates for each zone
intent.raw_input: design a residential HVAC ductwork system

requirement_spec.design_goal: Design a residential HVAC ductwork system

requirements.description: Design object type resolved as hvac_ductwork
requirements.originating_text: design a residential HVAC ductwork system
downstream_design_consequences: Initializes constraint graph even when numeric targets are absent

requirement_spec.completeness_rationale: All required engineering decisions resolved from prompt.

functional_analysis.primary_function: Design and implement a residential HVAC ductwork system that delivers conditioned air efficiently and safely while complying with building codes, minimizing energy losses, and ensuring occupant comfort, noise control, and air quality.

functions.name: Duct Network Design
functions.description: Create the layout, sizing, and routing of duct segments to optimally deliver conditioned air across residential zones.

functions.name: Airflow Path Planning
functions.description: Determine supply and return airflow paths and velocities within the duct network to ensure even distribution and meet pressure constraints.

functions.name: Pressure Equalization
functions.description: Balance static and dynamic pressures across all duct junctions to reduce pressure loss and avoid draughts.

functions.name: Thermal Insulation Management
functions.description: Select and integrate insulation materials and sacrificial layers to minimize heat loss/gain in ducts and maintain system efficiency.

functions.name: Acoustic Damping
functions.description: Design acoustic treatments such as sound traps, baffles, and duct liners to reduce noise transmitted to occupied zones.

functions.name: Material Selection and Testing
functions.description: Identify and qualify duct and insulation materials based on thermal, corrosion, and structural criteria.

functions.name: Airtight Jointing and Sealing
functions.description: Ensure all duct joints, connections, and penetrations are airtight to prevent airflow leakage, noise transmission, and contaminant escape.

functions.name: Control Integration
functions.description: Provide control signals and sensor interfaces for pressure, temperature, and airflow monitoring and adjustment.

functions.name: Building Code Compliance
functions.description: Assess the duct design against applicable building, fire, and HVAC codes to guarantee safety and regulatory approval.

functions.name: Filter and Air Quality Provision
functions.description: Specify filter placements and types to maintain indoor air quality targets while keeping pressure loss acceptable.

flows.description: Material specifications and performance data feed into duct network size and material selection.
Building code requirements constrain duct sizes, materials, and placement.
Acoustic treatment parameters influence airflow path design to avoid resonant frequencies.
Pressure balance constraints inform velocity and sizing decisions in airflow path planning.
Real‑time pressure sensor data enable active pressure adjustment.
Filter configuration data (location, type, pressure drop) influence airflow path and pressure loss calculations.

required_assemblies.name: Primary Duct Network
required_assemblies.purpose: Route conditioned air between supply and return zones while meeting pressure and thermal specifications.

required_assemblies.name: Joint & Sealing Module
required_assemblies.purpose: Provide sealed junctions between ducts to prevent leakage and maintain noise isolation.

required_assemblies.name: Insulation & Material Module
required_assemblies.purpose: Insulate ducts and embed selected material properties for durability and thermal performance.

required_assemblies.name: Control & Compliance Module
required_assemblies.purpose: Integrate real‑time control signals and enforce building code constraints across the duct network.

required_assemblies.name: Filter Module
required_assemblies.purpose: Provide filtration to maintain indoor air quality while keeping pressure loss within limits.

component_names: Forged Steel Duct Flange with 3/4" Insertion

Silicone Gasket Strip for Duct Junctions
